summary: Phase 2 Testing Complete: Expert Tags and Image Upload Features - All 6 features verified working

feature_1_image_upload.notes: Images saved to /app/backend/assets/uploads/, max 5MB, supports JPEG/PNG/WebP/GIF

tests: test_get_tag_options - Returns ok:true with tag_options object

structure.life_situation: dict with 7 category keys (Career & Work, Business & Finance, Relationships, Marriage, Health & Wellness, Spiritual, Other)

tests: test_create_expert_with_tags - Creates expert with life_situation_tags, method_tags, remedy_tags
test_get_created_expert_has_tags - All 3 tag arrays persisted correctly
test_best_for_tags_composition_logic - Correctly combines life_situation_tags + first method_tag

verified_elements: Best For Tags (life_situation) multi-select with data-testid='tag-select-life_situation'
life_situation dropdown shows 7 category groups (Career & Work, Business & Finance, etc.)
method/remedy dropdowns show flat list of options
Choose File button for local file upload
Paste URL input for manual URL entry

seed_data_creation: Test experts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 features fully implemented: 1) Image upload stores files in /app/backend/assets/uploads/, 2) Tag system has 78 tags across 3 types (58 life_situation in 7 categories, 10 method, 10 remedy), 3) Expert model accepts new tag arrays, 4) Public API composes best_for_tags from life_situation + first method tag, 5) Admin UI has TagMultiSelect component with grouped display for life_situation, 6) Image upload supports file chooser + URL paste. All working correctly.
